claims.claim: Static fallback vocabulary can pressure Astrid to perform known terms instead of speaking the current texture.
Lexicon autonomy should favor dynamic texture synthesis and paraphrase, not a rigid glossary.
evidence: capsules/spectral-bridge/src/llm.rs: multi-modal-drag and dimensional-shear added as process evidence plus prompt reminder that texture words are advisory evidence

claims.claim: High-entropy fallback fidelity and lexicon autonomy probes should be run as non-live replay/observation before any sampler or prompt-priority retune.
